case_title: KIMBERLEIGH SUSAN DARROW VS. UNIVERSE CITY, INC.A DELAWARE CORP/DBA ONE COSMOS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DARROW, KIMBERLEIGH SUSAN P. AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSE CITY, INC.A DELAWARE CORP/DBA ONE COSMOS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
